resources.string: Find answers to common questions below
How do I report a lost item?
To report a lost item, simply go to lost section, click on \'+\' button and add all the required information.
How can I check if someone found my lost item?
You can check for your item in found section
What should I do if I found a lost item?
If you found an item go to found section, click on \'+\' button and add all the required information about you and the found item
How long should I wait before my item appears?
Your item will appear immediately after posting. Make sure to check both lost and found sections regularly for updates.

We are a group of Holy Crossian college students behind this lost and found app. Our goal is to simplify the process of finding and returning lost items within our school community, promoting a sense of responsibility and unity.

Our team is made up of dedicated individuals who are excited to enhance your lost and found experience. We\'re here to make your life easier and encourage you to get involved in reuniting with your belongings.\n\nThank you for being part of our journey!
Your trust is important to us.

We collect user data and device information to provide lost and found services, improve the app, and communicate with users. Your data is safeguarded for security, and we do not share it unless you consent or when legally required. You have the right to access, correct, or delete your information and manage communication preferences. We may update this policy and will post changes here. For questions or requests, please contact us at [Your Contact Information]. By using the app, you agree to these terms.
